_banner: LOCKED spec-data -- InitechOS FLAIR Color Canon (CLAUDE.md Rule 8). DO NOT EDIT to make a test pass. Deliberate spec changes only, with a beads issue + worklog note.
ratified_by: ADR-0004-AMENDMENT-DEC-09 + ADR-0010 (FLAIR Grading and Goldens); supersedes ADR-0004 OD-4 (seafoam desktop canon, REVOKED).
purpose: THE single source of truth for FLAIR color POLICY: a palette INDEX -> a canonical 0x00RRGGBB value. The mechanism (surface/GrafPort/region clip/Manager geometry) names INDICES only and never an RGB literal (ADR-0004 C-8, P1). chrome.c/control.c/dialog.c/render.c/palette.h's five duplicated index->RGB switches collapse onto the single accessor flair_canon_rgb(idx) generated into spec/assets/color_canon.h.

grading_contract.principle: P3 -- every color entry is graded by a LIVE diff against an INDEPENDENT decomp golden (the test-clut pattern), NEVER by-construction (an oracle must not read the same source the artifact renders from). The ONE value oracle is test-color-canon (harness/proptest/test_color_canon.c).
grading_contract.golden_path_resolution: Per-row golden resolved by macro priority: FLAIR_<ROW>_GOLDEN_PATH > $(SYSTEM7_DECOMP)/goldens|specs/... or $(WIN31_DECOMP)/refs|specs/... > built-in default. SYSTEM7_DECOMP ?= ../system7-decomp ; WIN31_DECOMP ?= ../win31-decomp.
grading_contract.loud_skip: If a sibling golden is absent the oracle LOUD-SKIPS that leg (prints the exact missing path), NEVER silent-passes, and prints a 'N rows NOT graded (goldens absent)' summary line.
grading_contract.authored_exception: graded_by:'authored' rows have NO upstream decomp golden (they are Initech identity injections). They are gated against DRIFT by a locked-constant equality + a VALUE mutant (e.g. seafoam-relapse must go RED), and are NEVER claimed decomp-sourced (P4 honesty).
grading_contract.win_depth_trap: Win-3.1/GDI rows (idx5/idx6) grade the DOCUMENTED indexed-8 WIN.INI value as PRIMARY (#000080 / #C0C0C0); a 16-color VGA artifact (#0000AA / #C3C7CB) is corroboration-ONLY; a swamping (~42-level) blue tolerance is REJECTED (Stop condition, R5).

wctb_crosswalk_note: idx0..4 map to wctb part-codes (R8). idx7/idx8 are the pinstripe RENDERED dither shades graded vs pinstripe.md -- they are NOT wctb part7/part8 (which are the #FFFFFF/#000000 WDEF hilite-table ENDPOINTS, a distinct lane). The bevel rows substitute teal for the System-7 dialog-lavender wctb part9/part11.

entries.name: CIDX_BLACK
entries.role: ink / window frame / box borders / text
entries.graded_by: live-diff vs wctb binary part1 (LEG A, TOL=0) + win31 WindowFrame #000000 corroboration (LEG B)

entries.name: CIDX_WHITE
entries.graded_by: live-diff vs wctb binary part0 (LEG A, TOL=0) + win31 COLOR_WINDOW #FFFFFF corroboration (LEG B)

entries.name: CIDX_DESKTOP
entries.source_golden: AUTHORED -- operator WL-0053 (VIC-20 cyan, hardware colour 3, screen/phosphor value). No upstream decomp golden exists.
entries.graded_by: authored -- generated-header-vs-LOCKED-json equality + green-cyan-octant luminance bound + the seafoam-relapse VALUE mutant (CANON_MUTATE_TEAL #8DDCDC->#6FA08E MUST go RED). NEVER claimed decomp-sourced.

entries.name: CIDX_MENUBAR
entries.role: menu-bar background -- white bar, black baseline (System-7)
entries.wctb_part: part0 (wContentColor; the bar shares content white)
entries.source_golden: $(SYSTEM7_DECOMP)/goldens/resources/wctb_0_System_753.bin part0 = #FFFFFF (WL-0053 'white bar, black baseline'; the win31 COLOR_MENU #C0C0C0 is correctly NOT used -- System-7 chrome owns the bar)
entries.graded_by: live-diff vs wctb binary part0 (LEG A, TOL=0)

entries.name: CIDX_TITLE_INK
entries.role: title ink / title + control title text
entries.graded_by: live-diff vs wctb binary part2 (LEG A, TOL=0)

entries.name: CIDX_ACCENT
entries.role: accent navy -- progress bar / 116% pie / selection / active caption
entries.source_golden: $(WIN31_DECOMP)/refs/win31-chrome/default-colors-cross-check.txt ActiveTitle/Hilight 0 0 128 = #000080 (3 independent documented WIN.INI sources); $(WIN31_DECOMP)/specs/chrome/color-scheme.md COLOR_ACTIVECAPTION (2)
entries.graded_by: live-diff vs win31 default-colors-cross-check.txt (LEG B). DEPTH-TRAP: indexed-8 #000080 PRIMARY; 16-color #0000AA corroboration-ONLY; REJECT ~42-level blue tolerance (R5, Stop condition)

entries.name: CIDX_CONTROL
entries.role: control face / BTNFACE -- scrollbar track, arrow-button face, button face
entries.graded_by: live-diff vs win31 default-colors-cross-check.txt (LEG B). indexed-8 #C0C0C0 PRIMARY; DOSBox-X #C3C7CB is a 16-color VGA artifact, corroboration-only

entries.name: CIDX_PIN_LIGHT
entries.role: pinstripe LIGHT row -- active title-bar racing-stripe highlight
entries.wctb_part: none (rendered dither shade, NOT wctb part7 #FFFFFF endpoint)
entries.graded_by: live-diff vs pinstripe.md rendered rows (LEG C)

entries.name: CIDX_PIN_DARK
entries.role: pinstripe DARK row -- active title-bar racing-stripe shadow
entries.wctb_part: none (rendered dither shade, NOT wctb part8 #000000 endpoint)
entries.graded_by: live-diff vs pinstripe.md rendered rows (LEG C)

derived_rows.name: bevel_light
derived_rows.role: title/dialog 3-D bevel + groove HIGHLIGHT (the WL-0053 lavender->teal swap)
derived_rows.source_golden: AUTHORED -- WL-0053 replaces ALL System-7 lavender bevel/groove tinge (#DADAFF/#B3B3DA/#CCCCFF/#8787B3/#333366) with Initech teal. == entries idx2 teal.
derived_rows.graded_by: authored -- locked-constant equality (== idx2 teal) + a lavender-relapse VALUE mutant (#8DDCDC->#DADAFF MUST go RED). Graded against the pinstripe.md lavender rows ONLY as a recorded SUPERSEDED baseline, never as the expected value.

derived_rows.name: bevel_shadow
derived_rows.role: title/dialog 3-D bevel + groove SHADOW (darkened teal, same hue as #8DDCDC)
derived_rows.source_golden: AUTHORED -- WL-0053 darkened teal, preserves the 3-D bevel with the Initech hue. Replaces System-7 #B3B3DA.
derived_rows.graded_by: authored -- locked-constant + DERIVED-SHADOW lock (same-hue-as-bevel_light proof) + a lavender-relapse VALUE mutant.

OD-4_seafoam.note: Was ADR-0004 OD-4 desktop_bg canon + the D-8 'canon' hard-gate row. Superseded by idx2 Initech teal #8DDCDC. Retained here for revocation-history traceability ONLY; nothing renders it; the seafoam-relapse VALUE mutant uses it as the RED-must-fire target.

preview_webp_samples.status: PROVENANCE ONLY (REVOKED as render/oracle source, HER-03)
preview_webp_samples.note: The spec/assets/palette.h 3x3 frame samples (#7F7F86 white, #67696C menubar, #6B6B74 pinstripe, #1E2F87 accent) are a dim Office-Space CRT MOCK-UP. They survive only as INITECH_*_FRAME_V0 provenance constants; NOTHING renders or grades against them (P4).
